zh.lifeSummary: 當Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd於1359年出生在威爾士丹比爾希哈特時，他的父親Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd29歲，母親Eleanor ferch Thomas24歲。他和Elen ferch Thomas至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他於1404年登記服兵役。他去世於大約1415年在英國賀福爾蒙寧頓 奧 維也享年57歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾賀福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd于1359年出生在威尔士丹比爾希哈特时，他的父亲Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd29岁，母亲Eleanor ferch Thomas24岁。他和Elen ferch Thomas至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他于1404年登记服兵役。他去世于大约1415年在英国賀福爾蒙寧頓 奧 維也享年57岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾賀福德。

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Owain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps derived in the Roman period from the Latin name Eugenius ( see Eugene ); alternatively, possibly from an Old Celtic name meaning ‘born of Esos’. Esos (or Aesos) was a Celtic god known to have been the subject of a cult in ancient Gaul.

nameMeanings.name: Glyndŵr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Adopted in the 20th century in honour of the medieval Welsh patriot Owain Glyndŵr ( c.1359–1416 ; known in English as Owen Glendower ). In his case it was a byname referring to the fact that he came from a place named with Welsh glyn ‘valley’ + dŵr ‘water’.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd was born in 1359, in Sycharth, Denbighshire, Wales, his father, Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd, was 29 and his mother, Eleanor ferch Thomas, was 24. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Elen ferch Thomas. He registered for military service in 1404. He died about 1415, in Monnington on Wye, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Hereford, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd est né en 1359, à Sycharth, Denbighshire, Galles, son père, Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Eleanor ferch Thomas, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Elen ferch Thomas. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1404. Il est décédé environ 1415, à Monnington on Wye, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd 1359 in Sycharth, Denbighshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd 29 und seine Mutter Eleanor ferch Thomas 24. Er hatte mit Elen ferch Thomas mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1404 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb um 1415 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Monnington on Wye, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Hereford, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd è nato il nel 1359 nel Sycharth, Denbighshire, Galles, il suo padre, Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor ferch Thomas, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Elen ferch Thomas. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1404. Morì circa 1415, nel Monnington on Wye, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Hereford, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffyddが1359年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアシチャースで生まれた時，父Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffyddは29歳，母Eleanor ferch Thomasは24歳であった。彼はElen ferch Thomasとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1404年に兵役登録をした。彼は約1415年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアモニントン オン ウイで57歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd(이)가 1359년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 시처스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor ferch Thomas(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Elen ferch Thomas(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1404년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 대략 1415년 영국 허퍼드실르 몬잉턴  윈예에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd nasceu em 1359, em Sycharth, Denbighshire, Gales, seu pai, Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor ferch Thomas, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Elen ferch Thomas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1404. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1415, em Monnington on Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd родился в 1359 г. в местности сичарт, денбаишир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor ferch Thomas, 24. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Elen ferch Thomas. В 1404 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер около 1415 г. в местности моннингтон он ви, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd nació en 1359, en Sycharth, Denbighshire, Gales, su papá, Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Eleanor ferch Thomas, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Elen ferch Thomas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1404. Murió aproximadamente 1415, en Monnington on Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
